articles.title: Non-agency is not subprime. The mortgage industry needs to start acting like it.
articles.summary: Non-QM loans are unfairly stigmatized by the 2008 subprime crisis. Today's non-agency lending serves highly creditworthy, self-employed borrowers backed by strict Ability-to-Repay regulations and risk-retention rules.
